summary: Tested CelebrateContentModal centering fix, category strip, admin panel, and mobile behavior. CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: Desktop modal centering now works correctly (center_x=640.0 on 1280px viewport, wrapper div flex centering applied). However, 3 expected categories are missing from the strip (only 8/11 implemented).

ui_bugs.issue: Category strip shows only 8 categories, NOT the required 11. Missing: 'Frozen Treats' (frozen-treats, 24 products in DB), 'Party & Decor' (no products in DB), 'Nut Butters' (nut-butters exists in admin but missing from strip)
ui_bugs.details: Current 8: birthday-cakes, breed-cakes, pupcakes, desi-treats, hampers, bundles, soul-picks, miras-picks. Missing: frozen-treats, party-decor, nut-butters. The admin CelebrateManager category dropdown has 'nut-butters' and 'frozen' options.

ui_bugs.issue: birthday-cakes CATEGORY_API still maps to '/api/products?category=cakes&limit=40' (showing 40 of 111 'cakes' products). The agent context notes said it should map to 'celebration' category (106 products). Modal IS showing products (not empty) but uses wrong category.
ui_bugs.details: API verification: /api/products?category=cakes has 111 total, /api/products?category=celebration has 106 total. The modal shows 40 items (the limit). The 'NOT empty' requirement is satisfied but category is wrong.

action_items: Add missing categories to CelebrateCategoryStrip.jsx: frozen-treats (Frozen Treats, 🧊), party-decor (Party & Decor, 🎉), nut-butters (Nut Butters, 🥜) - and add corresponding entries to CATEGORY_API in CelebrateContentModal.jsx
OPTIONAL: Update CATEGORY_API['birthday-cakes'] to use 'celebration' category instead of 'cakes' to show 106 products instead of 40 (if that was intended fix)
critical_code_review_comments: CelebrateCategoryStrip.jsx: Only 8 of required 11 categories defined. Add frozen-treats, party-decor (or party-accessories), nut-butters to CELEBRATE_CATEGORIES array
CelebrateContentModal.jsx CATEGORY_API: 'birthday-cakes' maps to 'cakes', consider changing to 'celebration' category which has 106 products per agent context

success_rate.frontend: 75% - Main centering fix works, close button works, bundles work, admin works, mobile works. 2 issues: missing 3 categories in strip, wrong birthday-cakes API category

test_results.desktop_modal_centering: ✅ FIXED - center_x=640.0 on 1280px viewport (previously x=960/wrong). Wrapper div flex centering applied correctly.
test_results.category_strip_count: ❌ 8 categories (not 11) - missing Frozen Treats, Party & Decor, Nut Butters
test_results.birthday_cakes_modal_products: ⚠️ Shows 40 products (NOT empty ✅) but from 'cakes' category (not 'celebration')
test_results.bundles_modal: ✅ 6 bundles, centered on desktop (center_x=640.0), images showing
test_results.admin_products_tab: ✅ 308 products loaded, category dropdown with 14 options working
test_results.mobile_bottom_sheet: ✅ Works - clicking Birthday Cakes on 390px viewport opens bottom sheet modal with 40 items

context_for_next_testing_agent: Main centering fix VERIFIED working (iteration_103). Remaining work: 1) Add 3 missing categories to CelebrateCategoryStrip (frozen-treats, party-decor, nut-butters) 2) Optionally fix birthday-cakes CATEGORY_API to use 'celebration' category. Admin panel works with 308 products. Mobile bottom sheet works. All 8 existing categories open their modals correctly.

rca_of_issue.centering_bug: FIXED - Wrapper div with flex centering replaces CSS transform approach. Modal now at center_x=640.0 exactly on 1280px viewport.
rca_of_issue.missing_categories: CelebrateCategoryStrip.jsx CELEBRATE_CATEGORIES array only has 8 entries. Need to add frozen-treats (🧊 Frozen Treats), party-decor (🎉 Party & Decor), nut-butters (🥜 Nut Butters). Also need CATEGORY_API entries for these new categories in CelebrateContentModal.jsx.
